title: Application to renounce Canadian citizenship - R7.1 (for certain persons who acquired citizenship under amendments to the Citizenship Act in 2009, 2015 or 2025) - Canada.ca
content:
## Application to renounce Canadian citizenship - R7.1 (for certain persons who acquired citizenship under amendments to the Citizenship Act in 2009, 2015 or 2025)
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This application includes the following items:
- Application to Renounce Canadian Citizenship – R7.1 (for certain persons who acquired citizenship under amendments to the Citizenship Act in 2009, 2015 or 2025) (CIT 0496) (opens in new tab)
- Document Checklist - Application to Renounce Canadian Citizenship - R7.1 (for certain persons who acquired citizenship under amendments to the Citizenship Act in 2009, 2015 or 2025) (CIT 0501) (opens in new tab)
- Citizenship Photo Specifications
- Use of a Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in new tab)
- Instruction Guide (CIT 0496)
- Request form for a Change of Sex or Gender Identifier (IRM 0002) (opens in new tab)
- Addendum A: Applicant’s Additional Parent(s) Information and Authorization (CIT 0556) (opens in a new tab) , if applicable
- Read your instruction guide and download your application forms
- Complete, sign and date your application forms
- Mail your fully completed application to the Case Processing Centre in Sydney, Nova Scotia

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
